name: Lara Adult Cat Food Beef 2kg
description: Versele Laga Lara Adult Beef is a complete dry cat food with crisp chunks with a delicious beef flavor. Versele Laga Lara Beef will be a true flavor feast for your beloved cat. Feeding Guide: 3kg Cat – 55g per day (209Kcal) 4kg Cat – 70g per day (266Kcal) 5kg Cat – 80g per day (304Kcal) 6kg Cat – 90g per day (342Kcal) Make sure your cat always has plenty of fresh water to drink. Weight 2 kg Ingredients 0.2 mgE8 (selenium), 1.0% Phosphore, 1.1% Calcium, 1.4 3b202 (iode), 10.0% teneur en matieres grasses, 100 mg Vitamin E, 1000 U.I. Vitamin D3, 2.0% cellulose brute, 20000 U.I. Vitamin A, 32.0% Protein, 50 mg E1(fer), 57 mg E5 (manganese), 65 mg 3b605 (zinc), 7 mg E4 (cuivre), 8.0% cendres brutes, Antioxidants, Colorants Flavors Beef, Dry
